data analysis using pandas and numpy to examine rental market in miami, florida, reveals mean rental price of 1500 per month, median of 1450, and standard deviation of 200. outliers are identified as properties priced above 1800, which are considered extreme values in the dataset. * * *  

properties in miami, florida, include single family homes, condos, and apartments. single family homes have a mean price of 1600, while condos are priced at 1550. apartments have a mean price of 1520, with a standard deviation of 180. * * *  

visualizations show that the distribution of rental prices is skewed, with a higher concentration of prices around 1500. outliers are clearly visible in the plot, highlighting the variability in property values. is there anything else i can help with?
